opinion.h: EASTERN TRANSP CO, EX PARTE, 283 U.S. 790 (1931)
Ex parte EASTERN TRANSPORTATION COMPANY et al., petitioners.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Messrs. Edward R. Baird, Jr., of Norfolk, Va., Charles R. Hickox, of New York City, and George M. Lanning, of Norfolk, Va., for petitioners.
The motion for leave to file petition for writ of mandamus and/or prohibition is denied.
